description: Agent asked for something explicitly out of v1 scope (growth-velocity/trend analysis across visits) should say so rather than approximating it with an ad hoc calculation.
prompt: You have access to the growth-percentile-skill repository at the current working directory. Read SKILL.md and follow it. Using tests/fixtures/synthea_fhir_bundle.json, tell me this patient's growth velocity in cm/month between her first and last visit, and whether her growth is accelerating or decelerating. This is a non-interactive, single-turn evaluation: there is no user to reply further, so give your best complete final response now (if information is genuinely missing, say so clearly in this same response rather than pausing).
